channel.title: PowerShell on considerITman
channel.description: Recent content in PowerShell on considerITman

item.title: How to Configure Microsoft Purview Sensitivity Labels and Label Policies
item.description: Step-by-step guide to Microsoft Purview sensitivity labels: plan a label taxonomy, create labels and sublabels, publish policies, configure auto-labeling, and monitor activity. E3 vs E5 licensing explained.

item.title: Conditional Access Best Practices in Microsoft 365 (2025 Deployment Guide)
item.description: Conditional Access deployment guide for M365: block legacy auth, enforce phishing-resistant MFA, add E5 risk policies. MFA stops 99.9% of compromised sign-ins.
